mapper.sql: id, character_tags, character_explanation, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
from t_member_character_tags where is_deleted = 0 order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_member_character_tags (id, character_tags, character_explanation, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{characterTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{characterExplanation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into t_member_character_tags
id,
character_tags,
character_explanation,
create_time,
update_time,
create_by,
update_by,
is_deleted,

mapper.update:
update t_member_character_tags
character_tags = #{characterTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
character_explanation = #{characterExplanation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_member_character_tags set character_tags = #{characterTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, character_explanation = #{characterExplanation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from t_member_character_tags where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
